commands.cmd: pnpm exec prettier --check <expanded T017 allowed source, tests, and docs>
pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry-grocery-cooking.test.ts tests/unit/cooking.test.ts

goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: Repaired the rejected milestone without schema or migration edits. Grocery rows retain complete product/formula and per-meal recipe, entry, date, servings, ingredient, and contribution provenance plus sourceRecipeIds; UI distinguishes generated, uncertain, manual override, and obsolete-manual states. Shopping overrides and Pantry undo state transitions are atomic. Intake uses retry-stable operation keys that rotate after success. Full tests pass: 155 unit and 73 integration; lint, types, scoped format, OpenAPI, and diff checks pass.
deviations: Expanded the placeholder scoped-Prettier command to every T017 allowed source, test, and documentation path.
Kept the existing idempotency_key column while exposing the clearer operationKey API contract, avoiding forbidden schema and migration changes.
remaining_blockers: Production build and rendered workflow evidence remain unverified because shared .next is owned by an active development process.
